Likely belong to individual Tennessee Valley Unitarian Universalist Church members. Ask before picking. Access: Private.

Tennessee Valley Unitarian Universalist Church Garden. Members reserve plots for personal use and extras are given to Second Harvest Food Bank. Avoid picking from raised beds since they belong to members. Rosemary, thyme, catnip, strawberries, oregano, bronze
2912 Painter Ave SW, Knoxville, TN 37919, USA
In November and December you can see the nuts all over the ground next to the walking path Access: Public.
